title: Photorealistic Portrait Sadie Sink S Exact Face

She is sitting on a skateboard in a sunlit outdoor concrete setting, bright natural daylight with soft shadows. Wearing a delicate white crochet halter crop top with intricate lace texture that accentuates her figure, high-waisted olive green denim shorts, white crew socks with red and blue stripes at the top, gold mesh watch on her left wrist, thin gold anklet on right ankle, and small gold bracelets. Pose: knees apart, hands resting on the skateboard deck with red nail polish visible, looking directly at the camera. Highly detailed skin texture, realistic anatomy, cinematic lighting, sharp focus, 8k resolution, natural colors, professional photography style Aspect ratio: 9:16.
